trades.reasoning: Top score of 95 with RSI in bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price above SMA-20 — crypto mining names gaining traction alongside NASDAQ outperformance today.
Co-top score of 95 with clean bullish momentum signals across RSI, MACD, and price-above-SMA; semiconductor equipment is in a strong cycle and NASDAQ strength today validates the sector.
Score 90 with RSI 66.6 approaching overbought but still in valid momentum zone, MACD bullish, and price 5%+ above SMA-20 — strong growth name benefiting from tech tailwinds.

decisions.briefing: Markets came in neutral-to-positive today with NASDAQ leading at +0.9%, signaling continued tech appetite. With 4 open slots and $1,172 in cash, deploying into MARA and AMAT (both score 95) to capture semiconductor and crypto momentum, plus DUOL as a high-quality growth add. Existing positions — especially GLXY (score 90, still in momentum) — look healthy; no sells warranted.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities finished mixed but tilted positive Monday, with the NASDAQ outpacing the broader S&P 500 as investors rotated back into technology and growth names. Semiconductor and AI-adjacent stocks led the charge, reflecting ongoing confidence in the sector's earnings trajectory. The muted S&P 500 gain suggests the rally was concentrated rather than broad-based, a pattern often seen when institutional money is selectively adding risk rather than making a macro call.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週一收盤漲跌互見，但整體偏多，納指跑贏大盤，反映市場資金重返科技及成長股。半導體與AI相關個股引領升勢，顯示市場對該板塊獲利前景仍具信心。標普500溫和上漲，意味著此波反彈集中於特定板塊，而非全面性的風險偏好回升——這種格局通常出現在機構資金選擇性加倉、而非押注宏觀行情之際。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift money from one area of the market to another — today's NASDAQ outperforming the S&P 500 is a classic example of capital moving toward high-growth tech while other sectors lag. This creates windows where momentum-based strategies can add alpha by riding the sector receiving the new inflows. Recognizing which sectors are in favor helps you position before the move matures.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從一個市場板塊轉移至另一個板塊。今日納指跑贏標普500，正是資金流向高成長科技股、其他板塊相對滯漲的典型例子。這種現象為動能策略創造了機會——在資金持續湧入的板塊中卡位，往往能在行情成熟前搶得先機。辨識哪個板塊正受資金青睞，是主動選股的重要能力。
